vibe: Sleek, modern, premium, futuristic. Moving away from the 'beginning of electronic' or 'candy/magenta' feel. We want an immersive, high-end sweepstakes platform similar to bitspinwin/sugarsweeps but more refined.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Mobile-first. Padding should be p-6 to p-8 inside cards. Use bento grids for dashboard.
spacing_and_layout.mobile_nav: fixed bottom-0 w-full z-50 bg-[#0A0F1A]/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-white/10 px-4 py-3 flex justify-between items-center

components.cards: Cardless or 'Crystal Glass' style. bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-6. Add a subtle shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.2)].

buttons.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-amber-500 to-orange-500 text-black font-bold rounded-xl px-6 py-3 hover:scale-105 transition-transform shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(245,158,11,0.4)]
buttons.secondary: bg-gradient-to-r from-cyan-500 to-blue-500 text-white font-bold rounded-xl px-6 py-3 hover:scale-105 transition-transform shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(6,182,212,0.4)]
buttons.ghost: bg-white/5 text-white border border-white/10 hover:bg-white/10 rounded-xl px-6 py-3 transition-colors

components.header: Sticky top, backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0A0F1A]/80 z-50 border-b border-white/10. Must display dual currency balances prominently.
components.inputs: Shadcn UI heavily customized: bg-[#121A2F] border-white/10 text-white focus:border-amber-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-amber-500 rounded-xl

key_features.dual_currency: Header must show two balances side-by-side: Sugar Tokens (Gold Icon/Text) and Game Credits (Cyan Icon/Text).
key_features.amoe_claim: Prominent 'Daily AMOE Claim' button in the dashboard (legal requirement). Should have a countdown or 'Available Now' glowing state.
key_features.bottom_nav: For mobile screens, fixed bottom navigation with icons: Home, Transfer, Deposit, Redeem, Withdraw.
key_features.transfer_p2p: A dedicated section/modal to transfer Game Credits to specific platforms (Juwa, Milkyway, Vblink, etc.) using a select dropdown and amount input.

pages_to_build: Landing Page / Home (Hero with 3D characters, Deposit CTA, payment methods, features)
User Dashboard (Tabs: Games, Deposit, Redeem, Withdraw, History, Settings, Support)
Admin Panel (Analytics, User Management, Master Control, Redemption Queue)

hero_background.description: Abstract dark luxury futuristic casino background.
hero_background.usage: Use as a full-screen background for the Landing page hero section, wrapped in a div with bg-cover and bg-center. Add a dark gradient overlay so text remains readable.

mascot_bitcoin.description: 3D futuristic gingerbread man holding a glowing Bitcoin.
mascot_bitcoin.usage: Use in the Hero section or the 'Deposit/Crypto' section of the landing page.

mascot_creditcard.description: 3D futuristic gingerbread man sliding a premium black credit card.
mascot_creditcard.usage: Use in the 'Purchase Sugar Tokens / Deposit' tab of the dashboard.

floating_tokens.description: 3D floating glossy golden and cyan tokens on transparent background.
floating_tokens.usage: Use as a decorative floating element (absolute positioning) around the dual currency display or AMOE claim section.

icons_and_logos.strategy: DO NOT use placeholder URLs for game logos. Since we lack specific logos for Juwa, Milkyway, etc., create sleek typographic 'Game Cards' using gradients and the game name, or use Phosphor/Lucide icons combined with rich background colors to represent platforms.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. No neon pink/magenta unless explicitly requested by the user later. Stick to Obsidian, Gold, and Cyan.
Ensure all interactive elements have hover and focus states.
Implement the Dual-Currency header on the Dashboard.
Install and use 'Unbounded' from Google Fonts for headings, and 'Manrope' for body text.
For the Landing page hero, overlap the 'mascot_bitcoin' image over the 'hero_background'.
Build the dashboard using Shadcn Tabs or custom navigational layout. Ensure the mobile view uses the bottom fixed navigation.
The Transfer page should be visually distinct, emphasizing the P2P aspect with a clear 'Platform', 'Username', and 'Amount' layout.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, and form inputs for testing.
